methods.description: Process of selecting and documenting species for inclusion in the phylogenetic study, focusing on the Pooideae subfamily and other related groups.

steps.description: A total of 163 species (85 genera, 61 in Pooideae) representing nine subfamilies within the Poaceae were included in this study.
steps.searchable_summary: select and document 163 species from Poaceae subfamilies

steps.description: Sample details, including source, Genbank accession number and voucher information are included in Appendix S1.
steps.searchable_summary: document sample details including source and Genbank accession numbers

steps.description: Sampling focused mainly on subfamily Pooideae and all currently accepted tribes except Littledaleeae, Ampelodesmeae, Phaenospermateae and Brylkinieae.
steps.searchable_summary: focus sampling on Pooideae subfamily excluding certain tribes

steps.description: Representatives from other BOP groups and from several PACMAD lineages were added to increase the robustness of the Pooideae tree.
steps.searchable_summary: add representatives from BOP and PACMAD lineages

methods.description: Procedures for DNA isolation, amplification, sequencing, and sequence alignment for phylogenetic analysis using plastid DNA regions.

steps.description: DNA sequences from five plastid DNA (cpDNA) regions, two coding (matK, ndhF) and three non-coding spacers (trnT-L, trnL-F, trnH-psbA) loci, were used in the phylogenetic analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: use DNA sequences from specified plastid DNA regions for analysis

steps.description: Procedures for DNA isolation, amplification and sequencing and for sequence alignment are indicated in Appendix S2.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate, amplify, sequence, and align DNA as per Appendix S2
